channel.title: Terms and Conditions on CFD TnC and Privacy
channel.description: Recent content in Terms and Conditions on CFD TnC and Privacy

item.title: Accessibility Statement
item.description: CodeFryDev commitment to digital accessibility across the Ecosystem.

item.title: Community Code of Conduct
item.description: Expected standards of behaviour for CodeFryDev community participation, open source contributions, and support channels.

item.title: Copyright & DMCA Takedown Policy
item.description: Procedures for reporting copyright infringement on CodeFryDev properties.

item.title: General Terms and Conditions of Use
item.description: Master Terms and Conditions governing all CodeFryDev digital properties, services, applications, and software.

item.title: Legal Notice & Publisher Information
item.description: Publisher identification and legal contact information for CodeFryDev.

item.title: Security & Responsible Disclosure Policy
item.description: Procedures for responsible disclosure of security vulnerabilities in CodeFryDev products.

item.title: Trade Mark & Brand Usage Guidelines
item.description: Permitted and prohibited uses of CodeFryDev trade marks and branding.

item.title: Water App — Supplementary Terms
item.description: Product-specific Terms and Conditions for the Water reminder mobile application, supplementing the CodeFryDev General Terms.
